---
id: list-connections
title: "List connections"
description: "Get all connector connections. Connections represent authenticated connections to external data sources (OAuth tokens, API keys, etc.)."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/connections"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get all connector connections. Connections represent authenticated connections to external data sources (OAuth tokens, API keys, etc.).

  parameters={undefined}
